model_family_frequency.rare_definition: development frequency below rare_threshold, including unseen families

feature_descriptions.mileage_per_year: mileage divided by car age, with a one-year floor
feature_descriptions.target: used-car price in INR transformed with log1p for fitting

limitations: The source represents the Indian used-car market.
Prices are recorded in INR and are not converted to another currency.
The independent holdout is used once after CV-only model selection.
Legacy v2 category fields remain metadata-only when absent from v3 model features.
